REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-26-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FRANCONIA PROPERTIES, LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANTHONY DAY, PARTNER. DEFENDANT LEONID TURETSKY IS PRESENT. CASE SETTLED THROUGH MEDIATION PROGRAM. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NOV 26TH HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
